steps.title: This protocol prepares deepwell plates for extraction
steps.instruction: This protocol prepares deepwell plates for extraction. In the case that the protocol runs out of tips, it will automatically pause to prompt the user to refill tips.

steps.title: Place the 5 reservoirs and prelabelled...
steps.instruction: Place the 5 reservoirs and prelabelled 96 Well plates inside the Opentron.

steps.title: Opentron robot to add, 1ml of...
steps.instruction: Opentron robot to add, 1ml of 80% Ethanol from the reservoir into each well of the 96 well plate labelled, 80% Ethanol (do this for both 96 well plates labelled 80% Ethanol).

steps.title: Opentron robot to add, 1ml of...
steps.instruction: Opentron robot to add, 1ml of wash buffer from the reservoir into each well of the 96 well plate labelled, wash buffer (do this for both 96 well plates labelled Wash buffer).

steps.title: Opentron robot to add, 550µl of...
steps.instruction: Opentron robot to add, 550µl of viral binding solution and 50µl of binding bead in each well of the Sample plate.

steps.title: Opentron robot to add 50µl of...
steps.instruction: Opentron robot to add 50µl of Elution buffer into each well of the 96 well plate labelled, Elution.
